whyCredits.title: Why do Platform AI actions cost credits?
whyCredits.description: With Platform AI, CVeetje runs the AI for you on our servers using Claude Opus 4.7. Every AI action (parsing your profile, generating a CV, etc.) costs us compute at Anthropic. Credits cover these costs fairly and transparently.
whyCredits.ownKeyBenefit: With your own API key, you pay AI costs directly to your provider (like OpenAI or Google) — often cheaper with regular use. All CVeetje actions then cost 0 credits, including the PDF download.
whyCredits.tip: Tip: start free with 10 Platform AI credits. Like it? Add your own API key to save on costs.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction and Acceptance
introduction.content:
Welcome to CVeetje. These Terms of Service ("Terms") apply to the use of the CVeetje website and services (together the "Service"), operated by CVeetje ("we", "us" or "our").

By creating an account, using the Service or purchasing credits, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not use the Service.

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes become effective as soon as they are published on the website. It is your responsibility to regularly review these Terms. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Description of the Service
serviceDescription.content:
CVeetje is an AI-powered CV generator that helps users create professional CVs. The Service includes:

• Parsing and storing profile information (such as LinkedIn data)
• Analyzing job postings
• Generating tailored CVs using AI
• Generating visual styles and formatting
• Downloading CVs as PDF
• Optionally generating cover letters
• Exporting LinkedIn-optimized content
• Providing an indicative fit analysis between your profile and a job posting

The Service offers two AI modes: Platform AI (built-in AI via Claude by Anthropic) and the option to use your own API key from a supported provider. CVeetje is a writing assistance tool and not a selection or screening tool for employers.

For more information about how we use AI, see our AI Transparency page.

accountRegistration.title: 3. Account and Registration
accountRegistration.content:
To use the Service you must create an account. By registering you agree to:

• Provide accurate, current and complete information
• Keep your account credentials confidential
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
• Be responsible for all activities that occur under your account

You must be at least 16 years old to use the Service. If you are under 18 years old, you must have permission from a parent or guardian.

We reserve the right to refuse, terminate or suspend accounts at our sole discretion, particularly in case of violation of these Terms.

creditsAndPayments.title: 4. Credits and Payments
creditsAndPayments.content1:
CVeetje operates with a credit system. When using Platform AI (without your own API key), AI actions cost credits proportional to their size:

• Each user receives 15 free credits per month
• Free credits are reset on the first day of each month
• Unused free credits expire at the end of the month
• Purchased credits do not expire and are added to your balance
• PDF download is free (already included in CV generation)

Credit cost per AI action (Platform mode):
• Profile parse (LinkedIn/PDF): 2 credits
• Vacancy parse: 1 credit
• Match analysis: 2 credits
• CV content generation: 3 credits
• Style/design generation: 1 credit
• Cover letter (incl. humanizer): 3 credits
• Template fill (DOCX/PDF): 3 credits
• Chat editing: 1 credit per ~8,000 characters

A complete new CV with vacancy match typically costs ~9 credits.
With your own API key all these actions cost 0 credits (you pay your AI provider directly).
creditsAndPayments.content2:
Credits can be purchased via Mollie, our payment provider. Available packages (a complete CV costs 10 credits):

• 30 credits for €4.99 (Starter — ~3 CVs, €1.66 per CV)
• 100 credits for €12.99 (Popular — ~10 CVs, €1.30 per CV)
• 300 credits for €29.99 (Pro — ~30 CVs, €1.00 per CV)
• 600 credits for €59.99 (Power — ~60 CVs, €1.00 per CV)

All prices include VAT. Payments are processed in euros.
creditsAndPayments.content3:
Statutory right of withdrawal (consumers): For digital content not supplied on a tangible medium a 14-day cooling-off period normally applies (Dutch Civil Code art. 6:230o). By explicitly agreeing at checkout to the statement "I want delivery to begin immediately and I waive my right of withdrawal once credits are delivered" the right of withdrawal ends as soon as we add the credits to your balance (art. 6:230p(g) DCC).

Purchased credits are therefore non-refundable, except in the following cases:

• Technical errors on our side that make use of purchased credits impossible
• Double charging due to a payment error
• Unauthorised charge (not authorised by you)

Refund requests must be submitted within 14 days of purchase via info@groeimetai.io. Refunds are processed through Mollie back to the same payment method.

apiKeys.title: 5. API Keys and External Services
apiKeys.content:
The Service offers two ways to use AI features:

1. Platform AI: Use our built-in AI (Claude Opus 4.7) without your own API key. Each AI action costs credits.
2. Own API Key: Provide your own API key from a supported AI provider (such as OpenAI, Anthropic or Google). AI actions cost no credits.

By providing an API key:

• You confirm that you are authorized to use the relevant API
• You agree to the terms and conditions of the relevant AI provider
• You understand that you are responsible for all costs arising from the use of your API key via our Service
• You understand that the quality of AI-generated content depends on the chosen AI provider and model

Your API key is stored encrypted and is only used to generate content on your behalf. We do not have access to the unencrypted key and cannot view it.

userContent.title: 6. User Content and Data
userContent.content1:
You retain all rights to the content you upload or enter into the Service, including:

• Profile data and work experience
• Uploaded images and documents
• Job posting texts you paste

By uploading content, you grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide license to process this content for the purpose of providing the Service to you.
userContent.content2:
CVs, cover letters and other content generated by the Service are owned by you. You may use, modify and distribute generated content at your discretion.

We do not retain copies of generated content after it has been delivered to you, unless you choose to save your CV in your account.
userContent.content3:
Your account data and saved profiles are stored in Firebase (Google Cloud). You can at any time:

• View and delete your saved profiles
• Delete your account and all associated data

See our Privacy Policy for more information about how we process your data.

intellectualProperty.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content:
The Service, including the software, website, logos, and all associated intellectual property rights, are owned by CVeetje or its licensors.

You receive a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Service for personal, non-commercial purposes.

It is not permitted to:

• Copy, modify or reverse-engineer the source code of the Service
• Use the Service to build a competing service
• Resell or sublicense the Service
• Use our trademarks or logos without written permission

prohibitedUse.title: 8. Prohibited Use
prohibitedUse.content:
You agree not to use the Service for:

• Creating fraudulent, misleading or false CVs
• Infringing the rights of third parties, including intellectual property rights
• Uploading illegal, harmful or offensive content
• Circumventing security measures or disrupting the Service
• Automated access to the Service (scraping, bots) without our permission
• Reselling credits or account access to third parties
• Sharing your account with others

Violation of these provisions may result in immediate termination of your account without refund.

disclaimers.title: 9. Disclaimers and Limitations
disclaimers.content1:
The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without any warranties, express or implied. We do not guarantee that:

• The Service will operate uninterrupted or error-free
• AI-generated content is accurate, complete or suitable for any purpose
• The Service will meet your specific expectations
disclaimers.content2:
Content generated by AI models may contain errors, inaccuracies or inappropriate phrasing. CVeetje complies with Article 50 of the EU AI Act (transparency obligation): you always know that content was AI-generated. It is your responsibility to:

• Review all generated content before using it
• Verify factual information (dates, job titles, company names)
• Adjust content to your personal situation
• Not include misleading or false information in your CV

CVeetje does not make automated decisions with legal effects for you (GDPR art. 22). The fit analysis is purely a tool; employers do not see the score.
disclaimers.content3:
To the extent permitted by law, CVeetje is not liable for:

• Indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages
• Loss of data, profits or business opportunities
• Damage resulting from the use of or inability to use the Service
• Costs arising from API use with third parties

Our total liability is limited to the amount you have paid us for the Service in the preceding 12 months.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.content:
You can terminate your account at any time by contacting us or by deleting your account in the settings.

We may terminate or suspend your account:

• In case of violation of these Terms
• In case of suspected fraudulent or unauthorized use
• If the Service is discontinued

Upon termination:

• You lose access to your account and stored data
• Unused credits expire (both free and purchased)
• Your personal data is deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy

changes.title: 11. Changes to the Service
changes.content:
We reserve the right to at any time:

• Add, modify or remove features
• Adjust prices (changes do not apply to already purchased credits)
• Temporarily or permanently discontinue the Service

In case of significant changes we will inform you via email or via the Service.

governingLaw.title: 12. Governing Law and Disputes
governingLaw.content:
These Terms are governed by Dutch law.

Disputes arising from or related to these Terms or the Service shall be submitted to the competent court in the Netherlands.

Before initiating a dispute, we request that you first contact us to try to resolve the dispute through mutual agreement.

contact.title: 13. Contact
contact.content:
For questions about these Terms or the Service you can contact us:

GroeimetAI
Fabriekstraat 20
7311GP Apeldoorn
The Netherlands

Chamber of Commerce (KvK): 90102304
VAT number: NL004787305B79
Email: info@groeimetai.io

We aim to respond to all requests within 5 business days.

severability.title: 14. Severability
severability.content: If any provision of these Terms is declared invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect. The invalid provision shall be replaced by a valid provision that most closely approximates the original intent.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content:
CVeetje ("we", "us" or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your data when you use our website and services.

This policy applies to all users of CVeetje, including visitors to our website and registered users of our service.

By using CVeetje, you agree to the processing of your data as described in this privacy policy.

dataController.title: 2. Data Controller
dataController.content:
CVeetje is a service of GroeimetAI and is the data controller for the personal data collected through our service.

Business details:
GroeimetAI
Fabriekstraat 20
7311GP Apeldoorn
The Netherlands

Chamber of Commerce (KvK): 90102304
VAT number: NL004787305B79
Email: info@groeimetai.io

For questions about this privacy policy or the processing of your personal data, you can contact us at the email address above.

dataCollection.title: 3. What Data We Collect
dataCollection.content1:
When you create an account, we collect:

• Email address
• Name (if provided)
• Profile photo (if you sign in via Google or Apple)
• Password (stored encrypted)

If you sign in via Google or Apple, we receive certain profile data from these services in accordance with their privacy policies.
dataCollection.content2:
To generate CVs, we collect the information you enter:

• Personal details (name, contact information, location)
• Work experience and job descriptions
• Education and certifications
• Skills and competencies
• Profile photos you upload
• LinkedIn profile data (if you paste or import it)
• Screenshots or documents of old CVs

You determine what information you enter. We recommend only sharing information that is relevant to your CV.
dataCollection.content3:
We automatically collect certain information about your use of the service:

• IP address and device information
• Browser type and version
• Pages you visit and features you use
• Date and time of your visits
• Referrer information (how you came to us)

This data is anonymized for analytical purposes.

dataUsage.title: 4. How We Use Your Data
dataUsage.content:
We use your data for the following purposes:

• Providing our service: Generating CVs, cover letters and LinkedIn content based on your profile data.

• Account management: Creating and managing your account, processing payments, and tracking your credit balance.

• Communication: Sending important service messages, such as purchase confirmations or changes to our terms.

• Improving the service: Analyzing usage patterns to improve our service (anonymized data only).

• Fraud prevention: Detecting and preventing fraudulent or unauthorized use.

• Legal obligations: Complying with legal obligations, such as tax administration for payments.

legalBasis.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.content:
We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds (in accordance with GDPR):

• Performance of a contract: Processing is necessary for providing the service you requested (Article 6(1)(b) GDPR).

• Consent: For certain processing we ask for your explicit consent, for example for storing your profile data (Article 6(1)(a) GDPR).

• Legitimate interest: For improving our service and preventing fraud, taking into account your interests and rights (Article 6(1)(f) GDPR).

• Legal obligation: For complying with legal obligations, such as tax legislation (Article 6(1)(c) GDPR).

dataSharing.title: 6. Data Sharing
dataSharing.content:
We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We share your data only in the following situations:

• With sub-processors: See section 7 and our public sub-processor page (/sub-processors) for the complete current list, including jurisdiction and legal safeguards.

• With AI providers: In Platform AI mode we send prompt data to Anthropic under a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) + EU Standard Contractual Clauses. In BYOK mode your profile data is sent directly to the provider of your choice under their own terms.

• Under legal obligation: When we are legally required to do so, for example following a court order or report to the Dutch DPA.

• In case of business transfer: In the event of a merger, acquisition or asset sale your data may be transferred to the new owner; you will be informed in advance and may delete your account before the transfer.

thirdPartyServices.title: 7. Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.content1:
We use Firebase (Google Cloud) for:

• Authentication (Firebase Auth — sign-in and account management)
• Database (Cloud Firestore — storage of profiles, CVs, transactions)
• File storage (Cloud Storage — uploads, profile photos, generated files)
• Hosting (Cloud Run for the web app)

Our production environment runs in europe-west4 (Eemshaven, Netherlands). Primary data is therefore stored in the Netherlands. Google is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework and uses EU Standard Contractual Clauses for any intra-group transfers.

DPA: https://cloud.google.com/terms/data-processing-addendum
Privacy: https://firebase.google.com/support/privacy
thirdPartyServices.content2:
We use Mollie for processing payments. When you purchase credits, your payment details are processed directly by Mollie. We only receive confirmation of payment, not your full payment details.

Mollie is based in the Netherlands and processes data in accordance with GDPR.

More information: https://www.mollie.com/en/privacy
thirdPartyServices.content3:
AI models are used for content generation in two ways:

1. Platform AI (our built-in AI): We offer Claude by Anthropic (currently Claude Opus 4.7). In Platform AI mode GroeimetAI is the controller and Anthropic is the processor. We have a DPA with Anthropic, including EU Standard Contractual Clauses (module 2). Your profile summary and job description are sent to Anthropic. Anthropic does not use this data for training AI models (Anthropic Commercial Terms of Service).

2. Your own API key (BYOK): You can bring your own API key from a supported provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Mistral, Groq, DeepSeek, Together, Fireworks, Azure, Cohere and others). In that case you are the controller vis-à-vis the provider, and CVeetje only stores your encrypted key (AES-256) plus your model choice.

The full current list of AI and infrastructure sub-processors is available at /sub-processors. More on how we use AI is at /ai-transparency.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and Local Storage
cookies.content:
CVeetje uses cookies and local storage as little as possible:

• Essential cookies: for the functioning of the website (sign-in, language preference, cookie consent). These are strictly necessary and require no consent (Dutch Telecom Act art. 11.7a(3)(a)(b)).

• Analytics cookies (optional): for anonymous usage statistics via Google Analytics 4. Only loaded after explicit consent, with IP anonymisation and no advertising features.

You can withdraw consent at any time via the "Cookie settings" button in the footer or via our cookies page (/cookies). Under GDPR art. 7(3), withdrawing is as easy as giving.

The full list of cookies and retention periods is at /cookies.

dataRetention.title: 9. Data Retention
dataRetention.content:
We do not retain your data longer than necessary:

• Account data: Retained as long as your account is active. Upon deletion of your account, your data is permanently deleted within 30 days.

• Profile data: Retained as long as you save them in your account. You can delete profiles yourself at any time.

• Generated CVs: Retained in your account until you delete them or terminate your account.

• Transaction data: Retained for 7 years in accordance with legal requirements (tax legislation).

• Log data: Anonymized or deleted after 90 days.

yourRights.title: 10. Your Rights
yourRights.content:
Under the GDPR you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

• Right of access: You can request which data we process about you.
• Right to rectification: You can have inaccurate data corrected.
• Right to erasure: You can request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten"). Self-service via Settings → Account → Delete account.
• Right to restriction: You can request that processing of your data be restricted.
• Right to portability: You can download your data as a structured JSON file via Settings → Account → Export my data (GDPR art. 20).
• Right to object: You can object to processing based on legitimate interest.
• Right to withdraw consent: You can withdraw previously given consent at any time (e.g. cookie consent via your browser).
• Right to information on automated decision-making: CVeetje does not make automated decisions with legal effects for you.

To exercise these rights, contact info@groeimetai.io. We will respond to your request within 30 days (free of charge for the first request per calendar year).

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (https://autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl).

dataTransfers.title: 11. International Transfers
dataTransfers.content:
Your data may be processed outside the European Economic Area (EEA), namely:

• By Anthropic (USA) for Platform AI: under EU Standard Contractual Clauses (module 2) and a completed Transfer Impact Assessment. Inputs/outputs are not used for model training.

• By Google (USA/intra-group): EU-US Data Privacy Framework + Standard Contractual Clauses. Primary storage is in europe-west4 (Netherlands) — only support data may be accessed from the USA.

• By GitHub (USA) for feedback issues: EU-US Data Privacy Framework + Microsoft DPA.

• By Firebase Trigger Email extension (us-central1): for sending transactional emails. Source data is in EU Firestore; only the ephemeral send queue runs in the USA.

For each transfer we have assessed that the level of protection of the GDPR remains safeguarded through adequacy decisions (EU-US DPF, UK), contractual safeguards (SCCs), technical measures (encryption) and organisational measures (access control, audit logging).

security.title: 12. Security
security.content:
We take the security of your data seriously and have implemented appropriate technical and organisational measures:

• Encryption in transit: all traffic via HTTPS/TLS 1.2+.
• Encryption at rest: all Firestore and Storage data is encrypted at rest by Google (AES-256, Google-managed keys).
• API keys: user-stored API keys are separately encrypted with AES-256-GCM (env key ENCRYPTION_KEY).
• Authentication: Firebase Authentication with optional OAuth providers (Google, Apple); passwords are hashed by Firebase — we never see your password.
• Access control: server-side admin routes explicitly check permissions via verifyAdminRequest(); Firestore Security Rules scope to user level.
• Abuse detection: reCAPTCHA v3 on register/login; rate limiting on critical endpoints.
• Admin audit log: every admin action that touches personal data (impersonation, credit changes, role updates, account deletion) is immutably logged in a separate Firestore collection with admin UID, target UID, IP and timestamp (GDPR art. 32(1)).
• Responsible disclosure: see /.well-known/security.txt for the responsible disclosure procedure.
• Breach procedure: notification within 72 hours to the Dutch DPA per GDPR art. 33; notification to data subjects in case of high risk (art. 34).

Despite these measures we cannot guarantee 100% security. In case of a (suspected) data breach or security incident, please contact info@groeimetai.io immediately.

children.title: 13. Children
children.content:
CVeetje is not intended for children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under this age.

When registering with email/password you must explicitly confirm that you are 16 years or older (GDPR art. 8). This confirmation is recorded in your account document as audit trail.

For registration via Google or Apple, those providers perform their own age verification according to their own terms.

If you are a parent or guardian and discover that your child has provided data to us, please contact info@groeimetai.io so we can delete the account.

changes.title: 14. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content:
We may update this privacy policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons.

In case of significant changes, we will:

• Update the "last updated" date at the top of this policy
• Inform you by email if you have an account
• Show a notification in the application

We recommend regularly reviewing this privacy policy. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 15. Contact
contact.content:
For questions, comments or requests regarding this privacy policy or the processing of your personal data, you can contact us:

GroeimetAI
Fabriekstraat 20
7311GP Apeldoorn
The Netherlands

Chamber of Commerce (KvK): 90102304
VAT number: NL004787305B79
Email: info@groeimetai.io

We aim to respond to general questions within 5 business days and to requests regarding your rights under GDPR within 30 days.

aiTransparency.title: AI Transparency
aiTransparency.intro: CVeetje uses artificial intelligence (AI) to help you create professional CVs. On this page, we explain how we use AI, what choices we make, and how we comply with European AI regulations.

whatAiDoes.title: 1. What the AI Does in CVeetje
whatAiDoes.content:
CVeetje uses AI for the following functions:

• Generate CV content: Based on your profile data and a job posting, AI writes professional summaries, experience descriptions and skills sections.

• Analyze job postings: AI extracts job requirements, keywords and other relevant information from job posting texts.

• Fit analysis: AI compares your profile with a job posting and provides an estimate of how well your experience matches the job requirements.

• Generate styling: AI generates a visual design (colors, fonts, layout) matching your industry and the job posting.

• Process profiles: AI can extract information from uploaded documents such as LinkedIn PDFs or screenshots.

• Generate cover letters: AI writes a cover letter based on your CV and the job posting.

• Generate LinkedIn content: AI creates optimized texts for your LinkedIn profile.

whatAiDoesNot.title: 2. What the AI Does Not Do
whatAiDoesNot.content:
CVeetje maintains strict rules for AI-generated content:

• No fabricating experience: The AI does not invent work experience, education, certifications or skills that are not in your profile. Your CV only contains information you have provided yourself.

• No autonomous decisions: The AI does not make decisions about your career or job applications. All AI-generated content is a tool that you control.

• No screening or selection: CVeetje does not evaluate you as a candidate and does not make selection decisions. The fit analysis is solely an indicative tool for you as a job seeker.

• No storage for AI training: Your personal data is not used to train AI models.

models.title: 3. Which AI Models Are Used
models.content:
CVeetje offers two ways to use AI:

• Platform AI: We offer Claude by Anthropic (currently Claude Opus 4.7) as a built-in AI option. No API key is required. Each AI action costs credits.

• Own API Key: You can bring your own API key from a supported provider, including OpenAI (GPT-4), Anthropic (Claude), Google (Gemini), and more than 20 other providers. In this case, AI actions are processed directly through your own account with the provider.

With Platform AI, Anthropic (based in the US) is the AI provider. Anthropic processes data in accordance with their privacy policy and terms of use. We have a data processing agreement with Anthropic for the processing of personal data.

dataFlow.title: 4. How Your Data Is Processed
dataFlow.content1:
When you use Platform AI, the following data is sent to Anthropic (US) for processing:

• Your profile data (name, work experience, education, skills)
• The job posting text (if provided)
• Instructions for generating content

This data is only processed to complete your request and is not used by Anthropic for training AI models (in accordance with Anthropic's API terms for commercial use).

Processing takes place on Anthropic's servers in the United States. We maintain appropriate safeguards for this international transfer in accordance with Chapter V of the GDPR, including Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs). We have conducted a Transfer Impact Assessment (TIA) in which we concluded that the level of protection is adequate, given the nature of the data, the contractual and technical safeguards, and the low risk of access by foreign authorities.
dataFlow.content2: When you use your own API key, your data is sent directly to your chosen AI provider. CVeetje acts as a pass-through — processing falls under the terms and privacy policy of the respective provider. You are responsible for reading and accepting their terms.

userResponsibility.title: 5. Your Responsibility
userResponsibility.content:
AI-generated content is a tool, not a finished product. It is your responsibility to:

• Check all generated text for accuracy and completeness
• Verify factual information (dates, job titles, company names)
• Adjust content to your personal situation
• Not include misleading or inaccurate information in your CV

Employers may ask whether your CV was created with the help of AI. We recommend being honest about this when asked.

fitAnalysis.title: 6. Fit Analysis Disclaimer
fitAnalysis.content:
The fit analysis feature compares your profile with a job posting and provides an indicative score. It is important to know that:

• The score is an AI estimate and not a guarantee or prediction of your chances
• The analysis is not used by employers — only you see the result
• The score is not a decision and should not be treated as such
• You should always make your own assessment of whether a job is right for you

This feature is intended as a tool to help you assess your match with a job posting, not as a definitive judgment.

classification.title: 7. EU AI Act Classification
classification.content:
CVeetje is classified as a limited-risk AI system under the EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689). This classification is based on the following considerations:

• CVeetje is a consumer tool that helps job seekers write their own CVs
• CVeetje does not screen, rank or filter candidates on behalf of employers
• CVeetje does not make hiring or selection decisions
• The AI improves the presentation of existing information supplied by the user (Article 6(3)(b) — improving the result of a previously completed human activity)
• No practices from Article 5 (prohibited AI practices): no subliminal manipulation, no social scoring, no exploitation of vulnerable groups, no workplace emotion recognition

We meet the transparency obligations of Article 50 of the EU AI Act by:

• Clearly communicating that CVeetje uses AI for content generation
• Stating which AI models are used (see section 3)
• Informing users about their responsibilities when using AI-generated content (see section 5)
• Visibly labelling AI output where relevant

AI literacy (Article 4): we invest in understanding what AI can and cannot do. This page, /compliance and in-app explanations help you make an informed choice.

Dispute flow: if you think the AI generated something wrong, you can flag it via the "Dispute" button. A second LLM reviews the objection and regenerates correctly if you are right — at no additional credits.

We document our risk assessment and keep it available for supervisors. The Dutch Data Protection Authority (AP) is the supervisor in the Netherlands.

rights.title: 8. Your Rights
rights.content:
Regarding the AI processing of your data, you have the right to:

• Be informed about how AI processes your data (this page)
• Access what data is sent to AI providers
• Request deletion of your stored profile data and CVs
• Object to AI processing — you can always manually fill in your CV without AI
• File a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (https://autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl) or your local supervisory authority

To exercise these rights, you can contact us at info@groeimetai.io.

contact.title: 9. Contact and Questions
contact.content:
Do you have questions about how CVeetje uses AI? Contact us:

GroeimetAI
Fabriekstraat 20
7311GP Apeldoorn
The Netherlands

Chamber of Commerce (KvK): 90102304
VAT number: NL004787305B79
Email: info@groeimetai.io

We aim to respond within 5 business days.
